action.code: function(target){ const t=(target&&typeof target==='object')?target:{}; const by=String(t.by||'auto').toLowerCase(); const selector=String(t.selector||'').trim(); const query=String(t.query||'').trim(); return { by, selector, query, hasTarget: !!(selector||query) }; }

function(fields, requireFields){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); } function parseCountText(raw){ const s=asText(raw).replace(/,/g,''); if(!s) return ''; const m=s.match(/([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)\s*([kKmMwW万亿]?)/); if(!m) return s; const n=Number(m[1]); if(!Number.isFinite(n)) return s; const unit=(m[2]||'').toLowerCase(); let val=n; if(unit==='k') val=n*1e3; else if(unit==='m') val=n*1e6; else if(unit==='w' || unit==='万') val=n*1e4; else if(unit==='亿') val=n*1e8; return String(Math.round(val)); } function pickFromElement(el, labels){ if(!el) return ''; const txt=asText(el.innerText||el.textContent||''); if(!txt) return ''; const low=txt.toLowerCase(); let hit=false; for(const lb of labels){ const l=String(lb||'').toLowerCase(); if(l && low.includes(l)){ hit=true; break; } } if(!hit) return ''; const m1=txt.match(/([0-9][0-9.,]*\s*[kKmMwW万亿]?)/); if(m1&&m1[1]) return parseCountText(m1[1]); const m2=txt.match(/([kKmMwW万亿]?)\s*([0-9][0-9.,]*)/); if(m2) return parseCountText((m2[2]||'')+(m2[1]||'')); return ''; } function pickByAttr(labels){ const attrs=['aria-label','title','data-testid','data-test','class','id']; const nodes=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a,[role="button"],span,div')).slice(0,1800); for(const el of nodes){ const hay=(attrs.map((k)=>asText(el.getAttribute&&el.getAttribute(k))).join(' ')+' '+asText(el.innerText||el.textContent)).toLowerCase(); let hit=false; for(const lb of labels){ const l=String(lb||'').toLowerCase(); if(l && hay.includes(l)){ hit=true; break; } } if(!hit) continue; const v=pickFromElement(el, labels); if(v) return v; } return ''; } function pickByBodyRegex(labels){ const body=asText((document.body&&document.body.innerText)||'').slice(0,12000); if(!body) return ''; for(const lb0 of labels){ const lb=String(lb0||''); if(!lb) continue; const p1=new RegExp('([0-9][0-9.,]*\\s*[kKmMwW万亿]?)\\s*'+lb.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\]\\]/g,'\\$&'),'i'); const m1=body.match(p1); if(m1&&m1[1]) return parseCountText(m1[1]); const p2=new RegExp(lb.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\]\\]/g,'\\$&')+'\\s*[:：]?\\s*([0-9][0-9.,]*\\s*[kKmMwW万亿]?)','i'); const m2=body.match(p2); if(m2&&m2[1]) return parseCountText(m2[1]); } return ''; } function pick(labels){ return pickByAttr(labels) || pickByBodyRegex(labels) || ''; } const aliases={ likes:['点赞','赞','喜欢','likes','like'], comments:['评论','留言','comments','comment'], shares:['转发','分享','shares','share','repost','retweet'], favorites:['收藏','favorites','favorite','bookmarks','bookmark'], views:['浏览','阅读','观看','views','view','impressions','plays'], upvotes:['upvote','upvotes','顶'], downvotes:['downvote','downvotes','踩'] }; const defaults=['likes','comments','shares','favorites','views']; const want=Array.isArray(fields)&&fields.length?fields:defaults; const raw={ likes:pick(aliases.likes), comments:pick(aliases.comments), shares:pick(aliases.shares), favorites:pick(aliases.favorites), views:pick(aliases.views), upvotes:pick(aliases.upvotes), downvotes:pick(aliases.downvotes), pageUrl:String(location.href||'') }; const data={}; for(const f0 of want){ const f=String(f0||'').trim(); if(!f) continue; if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(raw,f)){ data[f]=raw[f]; continue; } const low=f.toLowerCase(); if((low==='likecount'||low==='like_count') && raw.likes) data[f]=raw.likes; else if((low==='commentcount'||low==='comment_count') && raw.comments) data[f]=raw.comments; else if((low==='sharecount'||low==='share_count'||low==='repostcount') && raw.shares) data[f]=raw.shares; else if((low==='favoritecount'||low==='favorite_count'||low==='bookmarkcount') && raw.favorites) data[f]=raw.favorites; else if((low==='viewcount'||low==='view_count'||low==='playcount') && raw.views) data[f]=raw.views; else data[f]=''; } const req=Array.isArray(requireFields)?requireFields:[]; const missingFields=req.filter((k)=>{ const v=data[k]; return v==null || String(v).trim()===''; }); const nonEmpty=Object.keys(data).filter((k)=>{ const v=data[k]; return !(v==null || String(v).trim()===''); }).length; return { action:'reactions', data, missingFields, meta:{ pageUrl: raw.pageUrl, nonEmpty, from:'rules' } }; }

action.query: 编写一个只读函数，从当前网页提取单个对象的互动数据。函数签名必须是 function(config)。严格禁止：导航跳转、网络请求、DOM 修改、事件触发。优先使用 config.target（selector/query）限定提取范围；未提供时在页面主内容区域提取。返回对象必须是 {action:'reactions',data:{likes:string,comments:string,shares:string,favorites:string,views:string,upvotes:string,downvotes:string,pageUrl:string}}。缺失字段填空字符串，不要 null。若遇到 1.2k/9.8万 等格式，保留原始字符串。

action.code: function(raw, fields, requireFields){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); } function normCount(v){ const s=asText(v).replace(/,/g,''); if(!s) return ''; const m=s.match(/([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)\s*([kKmMwW万亿]?)/); if(!m) return s; const n=Number(m[1]); if(!Number.isFinite(n)) return s; const unit=(m[2]||'').toLowerCase(); let val=n; if(unit==='k') val=n*1e3; else if(unit==='m') val=n*1e6; else if(unit==='w' || unit==='万') val=n*1e4; else if(unit==='亿') val=n*1e8; return String(Math.round(val)); } function toObj(x){ if(!x) return {}; if(typeof x==='string'){ try{return JSON.parse(x);}catch(_){ return {}; } } return x; } const obj=toObj(raw); const d=(obj.data&&typeof obj.data==='object')?obj.data:obj; const rawMap={ likes:normCount(d.likes||''), comments:normCount(d.comments||''), shares:normCount(d.shares||''), favorites:normCount(d.favorites||''), views:normCount(d.views||''), upvotes:normCount(d.upvotes||''), downvotes:normCount(d.downvotes||''), pageUrl: asText(d.pageUrl||obj.pageUrl||'') }; const defaults=['likes','comments','shares','favorites','views']; const want=Array.isArray(fields)&&fields.length?fields:defaults; const data={}; for(const f0 of want){ const f=String(f0||'').trim(); if(!f) continue; if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(rawMap,f)) data[f]=rawMap[f]; else data[f]=''; } const req=Array.isArray(requireFields)?requireFields:[]; const missingFields=req.filter((k)=>{ const v=data[k]; return v==null || String(v).trim()===''; }); const nonEmpty=Object.keys(data).filter((k)=>{ const v=data[k]; return !(v==null || String(v).trim()===''); }).length; return { action:'reactions', data, missingFields, meta:{ pageUrl: rawMap.pageUrl || asText(obj.pageUrl||''), nonEmpty, from:'run_js_codegen' } }; }

function(a,b,fields,requireFields){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); } function isNumLike(v){ return /^\d+$/.test(asText(v)); } function choose(v1,v2){ const s1=asText(v1), s2=asText(v2); if(!s1 && !s2) return ''; if(!s1) return s2; if(!s2) return s1; if(isNumLike(s1) && !isNumLike(s2)) return s1; if(!isNumLike(s1) && isNumLike(s2)) return s2; return s1.length>=s2.length ? s1 : s2; } const r1=(a&&typeof a==='object')?a:{}; const r2=(b&&typeof b==='object')?b:{}; const d1=(r1.data&&typeof r1.data==='object')?r1.data:{}; const d2=(r2.data&&typeof r2.data==='object')?r2.data:{}; const defaults=['likes','comments','shares','favorites','views']; const want=Array.isArray(fields)&&fields.length?fields:defaults; const data={}; for(const f0 of want){ const f=String(f0||'').trim(); if(!f) continue; data[f]=choose(d1[f], d2[f]); } const req=Array.isArray(requireFields)?requireFields:[]; const missingFields=req.filter((k)=>{ const v=data[k]; return v==null || String(v).trim()===''; }); const nonEmpty=Object.keys(data).filter((k)=>asText(data[k])).length; const pageUrl=asText((r2.meta&&r2.meta.pageUrl) || (r1.meta&&r1.meta.pageUrl) || ''); return { action:'reactions', data, missingFields, meta:{ pageUrl, nonEmpty, from:'merged_rules_codegen' } }; }

function(merged, requireFields){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).trim(); } const m=(merged&&typeof merged==='object')?merged:{}; const d=(m.data&&typeof m.data==='object')?m.data:{}; const req=Array.isArray(requireFields)?requireFields:[]; const missing=Array.isArray(m.missingFields)?m.missingFields:req.filter((k)=>!asText(d[k])); const vals=Object.keys(d).map((k)=>asText(d[k])).filter((v)=>v!==''); const nonEmpty=Number((m.meta&&m.meta.nonEmpty)||vals.length||0); const uniqueCount=new Set(vals).size; const suspiciousSameValue = vals.length>=3 && uniqueCount<=2; const baseOk=req.length>0 ? (missing.length===0 && nonEmpty>0) : (nonEmpty>0); const ok=baseOk && !suspiciousSameValue; return { ok, nonEmpty, missingCount: missing.length, requiredCount: req.length, uniqueCount, suspiciousSameValue }; }

action.prompt: 你是网页互动数据提取器。请返回结构化对象：{likes:string,comments:string,shares:string,favorites:string,views:string,upvotes:string,downvotes:string,pageUrl:string}。缺失字段返回空字符串，不要 null。

action.code: function(aiOut, fields, requireFields){ function asText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); } function normCount(v){ const s=asText(v).replace(/,/g,''); if(!s) return ''; const m=s.match(/([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)\s*([kKmMwW万亿]?)/); if(!m) return s; const n=Number(m[1]); if(!Number.isFinite(n)) return s; const unit=(m[2]||'').toLowerCase(); let val=n; if(unit==='k') val=n*1e3; else if(unit==='m') val=n*1e6; else if(unit==='w' || unit==='万') val=n*1e4; else if(unit==='亿') val=n*1e8; return String(Math.round(val)); } const a=(aiOut&&typeof aiOut==='object')?aiOut:{}; const raw={ likes:normCount(a.likes||''), comments:normCount(a.comments||''), shares:normCount(a.shares||''), favorites:normCount(a.favorites||''), views:normCount(a.views||''), upvotes:normCount(a.upvotes||''), downvotes:normCount(a.downvotes||''), pageUrl:asText(a.pageUrl||'') }; const defaults=['likes','comments','shares','favorites','views']; const want=Array.isArray(fields)&&fields.length?fields:defaults; const data={}; for(const f0 of want){ const f=String(f0||'').trim(); if(!f) continue; if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(raw,f)) data[f]=raw[f]; else data[f]=''; } const req=Array.isArray(requireFields)?requireFields:[]; const missingFields=req.filter((k)=>{ const v=data[k]; return v==null || String(v).trim()===''; }); const nonEmpty=Object.keys(data).filter((k)=>asText(data[k])).length; return { action:'reactions', data, missingFields, meta:{ pageUrl: raw.pageUrl, nonEmpty, from:'ai_fallback' } }; }
function(v){ return v && typeof v==='object' ? v : { action:'reactions', data:{}, missingFields:[], meta:{ from:'rules_empty' } }; }
function(v){ return v && typeof v==='object' ? v : { action:'reactions', data:{}, missingFields:[], meta:{ from:'merged_empty' } }; }
